codeReview.summary: The refactor successfully split the oversized files into focused modules, but it introduced a behavior regression in the recording image-selection message path.

issues.description: handleRecordingSelectImages no longer awaits recordingCoordinator.selectImages(). That method is async and throws when no recording session is active, so the refactored handler now responds with {success:true} before selection finishes and bypasses the top-level error handling that previously returned a failure response. This changes message-routing behavior for recording_select_images requests.

summary: Review failed: commit 305b4e7c8354f793ff02815651dc79bacabd19e4 introduced a blocking regression in recording_select_images by dropping the await on selectImages(), so the message router no longer preserves the original success/error semantics for that route.
